'''Mark Siegel''', born [[August 22]], [[1940s|1947]], in Minneapolis, Minnesota, USA, has worked in the visual effects, special effects, and art departments on many movies, including [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']] Special Edition, [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']] Special Edition and [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']].
Other notable film credits include ''Back to the Future'' (parts II and III), ''Men in Black'', ''War of the Worlds'', and ''Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Man's Chest''.

==Works==
===Filmography===
*[[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']] - Model and creature maker for the special edition
*[[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']] - Model and creature maker for the special edition
*{{Film|I}} - Concept sculptor
